meta.title: MinePanel - Self-Hosted Minecraft Server Manager
meta.tagline: Self-hosted Minecraft server management, the right way.
meta.description: A single docker compose up brings up the entire stack on your own machine. No external services. No cloud lock-in. Full control.

features.title: One-Command Deploy
features.description: The full stack - backend, database and MC servers - runs on your hardware with a single command. Zero external dependencies.

features.title: Docker-Native
features.description: Each Minecraft server runs in its own isolated container. Rootless Docker supported by default - no root privileges required.

features.title: Multi-Backend
features.description: The hosted frontend at minepanel.xyz connects to any number of independent self-hosted backends. Point it at your own instance URL.

features.title: Role System
features.description: Three roles: ADMIN, MOD, USER. MODs get granular per-server permissions without full admin access - built-in PBAC.

features.title: Real-Time Events
features.description: Live server stats, console logs, player joins/leaves, and host metrics pushed via WebSocket - no polling needed.

features.title: Security First
features.description: JWT via HttpOnly cookies, rate limiting, Helmet security headers, input validation, Docker socket guardrails, and path-traversal protection.

features.title: Mobile App
features.description: KMP app for iOS and Android. Not just for admins - players get their own portal: server status, access requests, push notifications, and profile.

features.title: Player Portal
features.description: Unlike other MC panels, MinePanel is built for players too. Browse your servers, request access, view your Minecraft profile and playtime - all in one place.

phases.label: Phase 1
phases.name: Foundation — v1.0
phases.description: The core deployable release. Everything needed to spin up and manage Minecraft servers from a single docker-compose on your own machine.

items.text: Server lifecycle (create, start, stop, restart, delete)
Startup reconciliation (DB vs Docker state sync)
Host metrics via WebSocket (CPU, RAM, disk)
Docker deployment (docker-compose + Caddy auto-HTTPS, migrations on boot)

phases.label: Phase 1.5
phases.name: Access Control & OAuth
phases.description: Fine-grained access control, social login, Minecraft account linking, and per-server visibility modes.

items.text: Minecraft account linking (Microsoft OAuth premium flow)
User status: PENDING / ACTIVE / BANNED enforcement

phases.label: Phase 2
phases.name: Developer Platform
phases.description: Audit log, API key authentication for programmatic access, and outbound webhooks for external integrations.

items.text: API key auth (mpk_ prefix, hashed, Bearer header)
Docker image pull via panel UI

phases.label: Phase 3
phases.name: Operations & Management
phases.description: The full operations suite — everything you'd expect from a mature server panel, all running locally on your hardware.

items.text: WebSocket real-time (logs, player events, server stats)
Server console (send commands via RCON / docker exec)
In-panel notifications (crash, high RAM, low disk)
Timed bans with auto-expiry via RCON pardon

phases.label: Phase 4
phases.name: Server Wizard & Presets
phases.description: Polished server creation flow — Quick Start presets, advanced mode, and a mod picker for Forge/Fabric servers. The RPG "class selection" of server creation.

items.text: Quick Start presets (Survival SMP, Creative, Minigame, …)
Pre-install mods before first server start

phases.label: Phase 5
phases.name: Networking & Bedrock
phases.description: Network multiple servers through a Velocity proxy with auto-generated config, and add support for Bedrock Edition players via GeyserMC or standalone bedrock servers.

phases.label: Phase 6
phases.name: Mobile App & Player Portal
phases.description: KMP (Kotlin Multiplatform + Compose Multiplatform) app for iOS and Android. Unlike other MC panels, MinePanel targets players too — not just admins.

items.text: Player portal: server status, access requests, profile
Push notifications (server online/offline, crash, whitelist approved)
Player profile: MC skin, playtime, linked account
